Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Activate test: "should charge 60 G for exactly 3 runes (block discount)" (line 26)
Current state: 9 tests passing
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts

The test should verify that 3 runes of the same type get the block discount: 60 G base premium instead of 75 G (3 x 25).
Items: [{type: "rune"}, {type: "rune"}, {type: "rune"}]
Expected premium: 60 base + 6 first insurance (10% of 60) = 66 + 5 fee = 71.

Current implementation sums each item individually: 3 x (25 + 2.5) = 82.5 → Math.ceil(82.5) + 5 = 88.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Green after completion.
You MUST output the full Step 7 block verbatim (both Compilation Prediction and Runtime Prediction lines, each with Correct or Incorrect). Do not abbreviate. Do not collapse the two prediction lines into one.
